title: 井底之蛙
meaning: 比喻见识狭隘、目光短浅的人

scenes.title: 青蛙在井底
scenes.prompt: A frog sitting at the bottom of a well looking up, cartoon style, limited view
scenes.narration: 有一只青蛙住在井底，觉得天只有井口那么大。

scenes.title: 海龟来访
scenes.prompt: A sea turtle talking to a frog at a well, cartoon style, conversation scene
scenes.narration: 海龟告诉它大海有多广阔。

scenes.title: 青蛙惊讶
scenes.prompt: A surprised frog learning about the big world, cartoon style, eye-opening moment
scenes.narration: 青蛙听了非常惊讶，原来世界这么大！
